member.name: T:CHDSharp.BugReporter
member.summary: Manages automatic bug reporting. Reports decompression and codec errors to the bug report API (rate-limited, deduplicated). Set to false to disable.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.BugReporter.Enabled
member.summary: Set to false to disable automatic bug reporting. Default is true.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.Chd
member.summary: Provides methods for validating, inspecting, and reading CHD files using parallel decompression.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.Chd.LoggerFactory
member.summary: Gets or sets the used for internal logging. Set before using any other API. If not set, logging is silently discarded.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Chd.TaskCount
member.summary: Number of parallel decompression tasks used during verification. Can be changed at runtime.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Chd.CheckFile(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Validates a CHD file from a using parallel decompression and hash verification. Returns a with version, SHA1, and MD5 hashes.
member.param: The stream to read the CHD from.
The filename associated with the stream, used for logging.
If true, performs full decompression and hash verification; otherwise only validates the header.
member.returns: A with the verification result and hashes.
member.remarks: This method does not handle differential (parent/child) CHDs. Use for those.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Chd.CheckFileWithParent(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Fully verifies a (possibly child/differential) CHD, resolving parent references against the CHD at (pass null for a standalone CHD). Returns a .

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Chd.IsChdFile(System.String,System.UInt32@)
member.summary: Quickly checks whether a file at the given path has a valid CHD header.
member.param: Filesystem path to a potential CHD file.
When this method returns, contains the CHD version number (1-5) if valid.
member.returns: true if the file exists and has a valid CHD header.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Chd.CheckHeader(System.IO.Stream,System.UInt32@,System.UInt32@)
member.summary: Reads and validates the CHD file header signature and version.
member.param: The stream positioned at the start of the CHD file.
When this method returns, contains the header length in bytes.
When this method returns, contains the CHD version number.
member.returns: true if the header signature is valid and the version is recognized; otherwise false.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Chd.DecompressDataParallel(System.IO.Stream,CHDSharp.Models.ChdHeader)
member.summary: Reads and decompresses all hunk data from the CHD file in parallel, validating CRC and building SHA1/MD5 checksums.
member.param: The stream positioned at the start of the compressed data section.
The parsed CHD header containing compression and hunk information.
member.returns: on success; otherwise an error code.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.ChdBlockRead
member.summary: Handles CHD block reading, deduplication of self-referencing blocks, and decompression caching.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdBlockRead.FindRepeatedBlocks(CHDSharp.Models.ChdHeader)
member.summary: Scans the map for entries and builds usage counts for referenced source blocks.
member.param: The parsed CHD header containing the block map.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdBlockRead.KeepMostRepeatedBlocks(CHDSharp.Models.ChdHeader,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retains the most frequently used blocks for caching, promoting them to keep their decompressed buffers, and flattens remaining self-references.
member.param: The parsed CHD header containing the block map.
The maximum number of blocks to keep cached in memory.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdBlockRead.GetWeigth(CHDSharp.Models.ChdHeader,CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry)
member.summary: Computes a relative weight for a map entry based on its compression type, used to prioritize blocks for caching.
member.returns: An integer weight where higher values indicate more expensive decompression.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdBlockRead.FindBlockReaders(CHDSharp.Models.ChdHeader)
member.summary: Resolves compression codecs to their corresponding reader delegates and stores them in the header.
member.param: The parsed CHD header whose readers will be populated.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdBlockRead.ReadBlock(CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry,CHDSharp.Utils.ArrayPool,CHDSharp.ChdReader[],CHDSharp.Models.CHDCodec,System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Decompresses a single map entry into the output buffer, handling compression, caching, self-references, and CRC validation.
member.param: The map entry describing the compressed block.
The array pool used for buffer rental and caching.
The array of decompression delegates indexed by compression type.
The pre-allocated output buffer to receive decompressed data.
The expected length of the decompressed data.
member.returns: on success; otherwise an error code.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.ChdCommon
member.summary: Provides conversion utilities between legacy CHD V1/V2 compression type values and the modern and enums.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdCommon.CompTypeConv(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Converts a legacy V1/V2 compression type value to a .
member.returns: The corresponding , or if unrecognized.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdCommon.ConvMapEntryFlagtoCompressionType(CHDSharp.Models.MapEntryFlag)
member.summary: Converts a V3/V4 to the unified V5 .
member.param: The legacy map entry flag value.
member.returns: The corresponding , or if the flag is invalid.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.ChdErrorExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for values.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdErrorExtensions.GetMessage(CHDSharp.Models.ChdError)
member.summary: Returns a human-readable message describing the error code.
member.returns: A user-friendly error message string.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.ChdFile
member.summary:
Provides read-only random access to a CHD file (V1-V5), including parent / child differential CHD chains.
Open a standalone CHD with . For a child (differential) CHD, supply its parent with or . Then decompress individual hunks with or read arbitrary byte ranges with .
NOTE: an instance is NOT thread-safe. It seeks a shared stream and mutates shared per-hunk buffers, so all calls must be serialized by the caller.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Version
member.summary: CHD format version (1-5).

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.TotalBytes
member.summary: Total size in bytes of the decompressed image.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.HunkBytes
member.summary: Size in bytes of a single hunk (block).

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.HunkCount
member.summary: Number of hunks (blocks) in the image.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Sha1
member.summary: SHA1 of the full image (including metadata for V4/V5), or the raw SHA1 when that is all that is available. May be null for V1/V2.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.RawSha1
member.summary: SHA1 of ONLY the raw (decompressed) image data, excluding metadata. This is what a full sequential read of the image hashes to. Null for V1/V2.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Md5
member.summary: MD5 of the raw image data (V1-V3). Null for V4/V5.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.RequiresParent
member.summary: True if this CHD is a differential child that requires a parent CHD to read.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.IsChild
member.summary: True if this CHD is a differential child. Alias for .

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Metadata
member.summary: Gets the list of metadata entries from the CHD header (game name, disc info, etc.). Lazy-loaded on first access; empty list if the CHD has no metadata or an error occurs.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the CHD file including version, size, and hunk count.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.ReadAllBytes(System.Byte[]@)
member.summary: Decompresses the entire CHD image into a single byte array. Returns on success. Be cautious: CHD images can be tens of gigabytes.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.EnumerateHunks
member.summary: Yields each decompressed hunk in order. The returned array is reused between iterations. Copy it if you need to keep the data beyond the current iteration.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Open(System.String,CHDSharp.ChdFile@)
member.summary: Opens a standalone CHD file from disk for random access. Fails with if the file is a child CHD.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Open(System.String,System.String,CHDSharp.ChdFile@)
member.summary: Opens a (possibly child) CHD from disk, resolving parent references against the parent CHD at . The parent is opened internally and disposed together with the returned instance.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Open(System.String,CHDSharp.ChdFile,CHDSharp.ChdFile@)
member.summary: Opens a (possibly child) CHD from disk, resolving parent references against an already-open . The caller retains ownership of (it is not disposed by this instance). Pass null for a standalone CHD.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Open(System.IO.Stream,System.Boolean,CHDSharp.ChdFile@)
member.summary: Opens a standalone CHD from an existing seekable stream for random access.
member.param: Seekable, readable stream positioned anywhere; it will be seeked as needed.
If false, the stream is disposed when this instance is disposed.
When this method returns, contains the opened instance, or null on error.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Open(System.IO.Stream,System.Boolean,CHDSharp.ChdFile,CHDSharp.ChdFile@)
member.summary: Opens a (possibly child) CHD from an existing seekable stream, resolving parent references against (null = standalone).

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.ReadHunk(System.UInt32,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decompresses a single hunk into .
member.param: Destination buffer of at least bytes.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Read(System.UInt64,System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads bytes from the decompressed image starting at , decompressing hunks on demand. A single hunk is cached so sequential reads within the same hunk avoid re-decoding.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the underlying stream (if not left open) and any internally-owned parent instance.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.ChdHeaders
member.summary: Parses and validates CHD V1-V5 file headers, reading compression configuration, block maps, checksums, and metadata pointers from the stream.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdHeaders.ReadHeaderV1(System.IO.Stream,CHDSharp.Models.ChdHeader@)
member.summary: Reads and parses a V1 CHD header from the stream.
member.param: The stream positioned immediately after the CHD magic and version fields.
When this method returns, contains the parsed header data.
member.returns: on success.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdHeaders.ReadHeaderV2(System.IO.Stream,CHDSharp.Models.ChdHeader@)
member.summary: Reads and parses a V2 CHD header from the stream.
member.param: The stream positioned immediately after the CHD magic and version fields.
When this method returns, contains the parsed header data.
member.returns: on success.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdHeaders.ReadHeaderV3(System.IO.Stream,CHDSharp.Models.ChdHeader@)
member.summary: Reads and parses a V3 CHD header from the stream.
member.param: The stream positioned immediately after the CHD magic and version fields.
When this method returns, contains the parsed header data.
member.returns: on success.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdHeaders.ReadHeaderV4(System.IO.Stream,CHDSharp.Models.ChdHeader@)
member.summary: Reads and parses a V4 CHD header from the stream.
member.param: The stream positioned immediately after the CHD magic and version fields.
When this method returns, contains the parsed header data.
member.returns: on success.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdHeaders.ReadHeaderV5(System.IO.Stream,CHDSharp.Models.ChdHeader@)
member.summary: Reads and parses a V5 CHD header from the stream, including the compressed or uncompressed block map.
member.param: The stream positioned immediately after the CHD magic and version fields.
When this method returns, contains the parsed header data.
member.returns: on success; otherwise an error code if the map is corrupt.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.ChdReader
member.summary: Delegate for decompressing a single CHD hunk: reads compressed data from and writes decompressed output to .

member.name: T:CHDSharp.ChdReaders
member.summary: Contains all CHD decompression codec implementations as reader delegates: zlib, LZMA, Huffman, FLAC, Zstd, and their CD-sector variants.
Provides AVHuff decompression support: combined Huffman/RLE-compressed audio and video interleaved in a single CHD hunk.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdReaders.Zlib(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Int32,CHDSharp.Models.CHDCodec)
member.summary: Decompresses a DEFLATE (zlib) compressed hunk from into .

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdReaders.Zstd(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Int32,CHDSharp.Models.CHDCodec)
member.summary: Decompresses a Zstandard-compressed hunk from into .

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdReaders.Lzma(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Int32,CHDSharp.Models.CHDCodec)
member.summary: Decompresses an LZMA-compressed hunk from into .

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdReaders.Huffman(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Int32,CHDSharp.Models.CHDCodec)
member.summary: Decompresses a Huffman-compressed hunk from into .

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdReaders.Flac(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Int32,CHDSharp.Models.CHDCodec)
member.summary: Decompresses a FLAC-compressed hunk from into , with optional endian swapping.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdReaders.Cdzlib(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Int32,CHDSharp.Models.CHDCodec)
member.summary: Decompresses a CD sector hunk using DEFLATE (zlib) for both sector data and subcode.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdReaders.Cdlzma(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Int32,CHDSharp.Models.CHDCodec)
member.summary: Decompresses a CD sector hunk using LZMA for sector data and DEFLATE for subcode.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdReaders.Cdflac(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Int32,CHDSharp.Models.CHDCodec)
member.summary: Decompresses a CD sector hunk using FLAC for sector data and DEFLATE for subcode.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdReaders.Cdzstd(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Int32,CHDSharp.Models.CHDCodec)
member.summary: Decompresses a CD sector hunk using Zstandard for both sector data and subcode.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdReaders.AvHuff(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Int32,CHDSharp.Models.CHDCodec)
member.summary: Decompresses an AVHuff-encoded hunk: parses the interleaved header, decodes Huffman (or FLAC) audio channels, then decodes delta-RLE Huffman video into the output buffer.
member.param: The input buffer containing compressed AVHuff data.
The length of valid data in .
The output buffer to receive decompressed data.
The codec state holding FLAC decoder settings and scratch buffers.
member.returns: on success; otherwise an error code.

member.summary: De Bruijn sequence lookup table used for fast integer log2 computation.

member.summary: Computes the base-2 logarithm of a 32-bit unsigned integer using the De Bruijn sequence.
member.returns: The floor of log2 of the value.

members.member:
Calculates autocorrelation data from audio samples A window function is applied before calculation.
Calculates autocorrelation data from audio samples. A window function is applied before calculation. Operates on raw pointers.
Pointer to sample data. Pointer to the window function values. Number of samples. Minimum lag to compute. Maximum lag to compute. Destination buffer for autocorrelation values (accumulated).

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Flac.FlacDeps.Lpc.ComputeAutocorrWindowless(System.Int32*,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double*)
member.summary: Calculates autocorrelation data from audio samples without applying a window function. Operates on raw pointers.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Flac.FlacDeps.Lpc.ComputeAutocorrWindowlessLarge(System.Int32*,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double*)
member.summary: Calculates autocorrelation data from audio samples without a window, using double-precision accumulation for large sample values. Operates on raw pointers.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Flac.FlacDeps.Lpc.ComputeAutocorrGlue(System.Int32*,System.Single*,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double*)
member.summary: Calculates autocorrelation across a boundary between two windowed sections using the window function. Operates on raw pointers.
member.param: Pointer to the window function values.
Start offset of the first section.
End offset of the first section (start of second section).

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Flac.FlacDeps.Lpc.ComputeAutocorrGlue(System.Int32*,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double*)
member.summary: Calculates autocorrelation across a boundary between two unwindowed sections. Operates on raw pointers.
member.param: Pointer to sample data, positioned at the boundary.

members.member:
Levinson-Durbin recursion. Produces LPC coefficients from autocorrelation data.
Produces LPC coefficients from reflection coefficients using the Levinson-Durbin recursion. Operates on raw pointers.
Maximum LPC order. Pointer to reflection coefficients. Destination buffer for LPC coefficients, stored as a flat array indexed by [order * MAX_LPC_ORDER + coefficient]. Thrown if exceeds .

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Flac.FlacDeps.Lpc.ComputeSchurReflection(System.Double*,System.UInt32,System.Double*,System.Double*)
member.summary: Computes Schur recursion to produce reflection coefficients and prediction errors from autocorrelation data. Operates on raw pointers.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Flac.FlacDeps.Lpc.DecodeResidual(System.Int32*,System.Int32*,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32*,System.Int32)
member.summary: Decodes an LPC residual back into audio samples using the given coefficients and shift. Operates on raw pointers.
member.param: Right-shift amount applied to the prediction value.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Flac.FlacDeps.Lpc.DecodeResidualLong(System.Int32*,System.Int32*,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32*,System.Int32)
member.summary: Decodes an LPC residual into audio samples using 64-bit intermediate prediction values to avoid overflow. Operates on raw pointers.
member.param: Right-shift amount applied to the prediction value.

member.summary: Provides a read-only decompression backed by LZMA or LZMA2 compressed data.
member.remarks: Supports forward-only reading. Seeking is limited to .

member.summary: Initializes a new LZMA decompression stream with unknown input and output sizes.

member.summary: Initializes a new LZMA decompression stream with a known input size.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.IO.Stream,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new LZMA decompression stream with known input and output sizes.
member.param: Exact size in bytes of the compressed data, or -1 if unknown.
Exact size in bytes of the decompressed data, or -1 if unknown.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.IO.Stream,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.IO.Stream,System.Boolean,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Initializes a new LZMA or LZMA2 decompression stream with full configuration.
member.param: Properties header (5 bytes for LZMA, 1 byte for LZMA2).
Exact size in bytes of the compressed data, or -1 if unknown.
Exact size in bytes of the decompressed data, or -1 if unknown.
Optional preset dictionary stream for training the decoder, or null.
true to use LZMA2 format; false for LZMA.
Optional pre-allocated buffer for the output window, or null.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the stream supports reading. Always true.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the stream supports seeking. Always false.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the stream supports writing. Always false.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.Flush
member.summary: Does nothing. The stream has no buffers to flush.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.Length
member.summary: Gets the total length of the decompressed stream, or the current position plus remaining available bytes if unknown.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the current position within the decompressed stream.
member.exception: The setter always throws. Use to advance.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.Read(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a sequence of decompressed bytes from the stream and advances the position.
member.param: The buffer to write decompressed data into.
The zero-based byte offset in at which to begin writing.
The maximum number of bytes to read.
member.returns: The total number of bytes read into the buffer, or 0 if the end of the stream has been reached.
member.exception: Thrown when the compressed data is corrupt or truncated.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.Seek(System.Int64,System.IO.SeekOrigin)
member.summary: Advances the current position by bytes from . Other origins are not supported.
member.param: The number of bytes to skip forward.
member.returns: The new position in the stream.
member.exception: is not .

member.name: M:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.SetLength(System.Int64)
member.summary: Not supported. The stream is read-only.
member.exception: Always thrown.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.Write(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Not supported. The stream is read-only.
member.exception: Always thrown.

member.summary: The total number of hunks in the image.

member.summary: Whether the V5 map is the uncompressed variant (offset word 0 means read from parent).

member.summary: The parsed array of map entries describing each hunk's compression type, offset, and length.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.Models.Flac.FlacDeps.AudioSamples
member.summary: Provides low-level unsafe memory operations for audio sample buffers.

member.summary: Represents the maximum unsigned 32-bit integer value.

member.summary: Interlaces two source sample arrays into a single destination array (S1[0], S2[0], S1[1], S2[1], ...). Operates on raw pointers.
member.param: Number of sample pairs to interlace.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Models.Flac.FlacDeps.AudioSamples.Deinterlace(System.Int32*,System.Int32*,System.Int32*,System.Int32)
member.summary: Deinterlaces a single interleaved source array into two separate destination arrays. Operates on raw pointers.
member.param: Destination buffer for the first channel.
Destination buffer for the second channel.
Number of sample pairs to deinterlace.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Models.Flac.FlacDeps.AudioSamples.MemCmp(System.Int32*,System.Int32*,System.Int32)
member.summary: Compares two sample buffers for equality. Operates on raw pointers.
member.returns: true if the buffers differ; false if they are identical.

member.summary: Copies uint values from source to destination. Operates on raw pointers.

member.summary: Copies int values from source to destination. Operates on raw pointers.

member.summary: Copies long values from source to destination. Operates on raw pointers.

member.summary: Copies short values from source to destination. Operates on raw pointers.

member.summary: Copies bytes from source to destination using aligned wider transfers when possible for performance. Operates on raw pointers.

member.summary: Sets int values at the destination to the specified value. Operates on raw pointers.

member.summary: Sets long values at the destination to the specified value. Operates on raw pointers.

member.summary: The maximum order computed for each section.

member.summary: Resets all section orders to zero, invalidating cached autocorrelation data.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.Models.Flac.FlacDeps.LpcWindowSection
member.summary: Represents a section of a window for LPC analysis, defining boundaries and the type of autocorrelation computation to use.

member.summary: Specifies the type of autocorrelation computation for a window section.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.Flac.FlacDeps.LpcWindowSection.SectionType.Zero
member.summary: Section of zeros (no autocorrelation computed).

member.summary: Unwindowed section using 32-bit accumulation.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.Flac.FlacDeps.LpcWindowSection.SectionType.OneLarge
member.summary: Unwindowed section using 64-bit accumulation for large samples.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.Flac.FlacDeps.LpcWindowSection.SectionType.Data
member.summary: Windowed data section.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.Flac.FlacDeps.LpcWindowSection.SectionType.OneGlue
member.summary: Glue section between unwindowed regions.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.Flac.FlacDeps.LpcWindowSection.SectionType.Glue
member.summary: Glue section between windowed regions.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.Models.Flac.FlacDeps.LpcWindowSection.MStart
member.summary: The start offset of this section in samples.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.Models.Flac.FlacDeps.LpcWindowSection.MEnd
member.summary: The end offset of this section in samples.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.Models.Flac.FlacDeps.LpcWindowSection.MType
member.summary: The type of autocorrelation computation for this section.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.Models.Flac.FlacDeps.LpcWindowSection.MId
member.summary: Identifier for cached section data (-1 if not cached).

member.summary: Initializes a new data section with the given end boundary.

member.summary: Configures the section as a windowed data region.

member.summary: Configures the section as an unwindowed (One) region.

member.summary: Configures the section as a glue section at the given position.

member.summary: Computes autocorrelation for this section, delegating to the appropriate method based on . Operates on raw pointers.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Models.Flac.FlacDeps.LpcWindowSection.Detect(System.Int32,System.Single*,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,CHDSharp.Models.Flac.FlacDeps.LpcWindowSection*)
member.summary: Detects window sections by analyzing the window function values and partitioning into sections of uniform computation type. Operates on raw pointers.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry
member.summary: Represents a single entry in the CHD block map, describing compression type, location, length, and caching state for one hunk.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry.Comptype
member.summary: The compression type applied to this hunk.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry.Length
member.summary: The length of the compressed data on disk.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry.Offset
member.summary: The file offset of the compressed data, or the source hunk index for self-referencing/parent entries.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry.Crc
member.summary: The CRC-32 checksum of the decompressed hunk data (V3 & V4). Null if CRC checking is disabled.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry.Crc16
member.summary: The CRC-16 checksum of the decompressed hunk data (V5).

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry.SelfMapEntry
member.summary: Reference to the source map entry when this hunk is a reference.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry.UseCount
member.summary: Number of times this block is referenced by other hunks; used for caching decompressed data.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry.BuffIn
member.summary: Buffer holding the raw compressed data read from disk.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry.BuffOutCache
member.summary: Cached copy of the decompressed output when this block is kept for reuse.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry.BuffOut
member.summary: Buffer holding the final decompressed hunk data.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry.Processed
member.summary: Whether this hunk has been processed during parallel decompression (for ordering during hashing).

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry.UsageWeight
member.summary: A computed weight value used to prioritize which blocks keep cached copies.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Models.MapEntry.KeepBufferCopy
member.summary: Whether the decompressed data buffer should be kept in for reuse.

member.summary: Reads statistics about array pool usage.

Number of arrays currently held in the pool.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.Utils.BitStream
member.summary: Provides bit-level reading from a byte buffer, used by the Huffman decoder to extract variable-length codes.

member.summary: Checks whether the bit stream has overflown past its declared length.
member.returns: true if the read position exceeds the data length; otherwise false.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BitStream.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The byte array to read bits from.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BitStream.Peek(System.Int32)
member.summary: Peeks at the next bits from the stream without advancing the position. Fetches more data if needed.
member.param: The number of bits to peek (0-24).
member.returns: The requested number of bits as an unsigned integer.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BitStream.Remove(System.Int32)
member.summary: Advances the input pointer by bits, discarding them.
member.param: The number of bits to skip.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BitStream.Read(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads the next bits from the stream (peek + advance).
member.param: The number of bits to read.
member.returns: The requested number of bits.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BitStream.Flush
member.summary: Flushes the bit stream to the nearest byte boundary and returns the number of bytes consumed.
member.returns: The number of bytes read from the source buffer.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.Utils.CdRom
member.summary: Provides CD-ROM ECC (Error Correction Code) generation for CHD sector data, producing P and Q parity bytes.

members.member: @brief ------------------------------------------------- poffsets - each row represents the addresses used to calculate a byte of the ECC P data 86 (*2) ECC P bytes, 24 values represented by each -------------------------------------------------.

@brief ------------------------------------------------- qoffsets - each row represents the addresses used to calculate a byte of the ECC Q data 52 (*2) ECC Q bytes, 43 values represented by each -------------------------------------------------.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.Utils.Crc
member.summary: A CRC-32 calculator using the ISO 3309 / ITU-T V.42 polynomial, with an 8-table slicing implementation for performance.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Utils.Crc.Crc32Lookup
member.summary: Precomputed CRC-32 lookup tables (8 tables, 256 entries each) for fast slicing.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.Crc.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class and resets the internal state.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.Crc.Reset
member.summary: Resets the CRC-32 state to its initial value and clears the byte count.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.Crc.SlurpBlock(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Processes a block of data through the CRC-32 algorithm using 8-byte slicing where possible.
member.param: The byte array containing the data to process.
The zero-based offset in at which to begin processing.
The number of bytes to process.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.Utils.Crc.Crc32ResultU
member.summary: Gets the CRC-32 result as an unsigned 32-bit integer.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.Crc.CalculateDigest(System.Byte[],System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Calculates the CRC-32 digest of a data range without mutating instance state.
member.param: The byte array containing the data.
The zero-based offset in at which to start.
The number of bytes to process.
member.returns: The CRC-32 digest as an unsigned 32-bit integer.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.Crc.VerifyDigest(System.UInt32,System.Byte[],System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Verifies that a CRC-32 digest matches the computed digest of a data range.
member.param: The byte array containing the data.
The zero-based offset in at which to start.
The number of bytes to process.
member.returns: true if the computed digest matches ; otherwise false.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.Utils.Util
member.summary: General-purpose utility methods for byte array comparisons, hashing, and ASCII detection used throughout the CHD reader.

member.summary: Determines whether every byte in the array is zero (or the array is null).

member.summary: Lexicographically compares two byte arrays for use in sorting.
